1212030.name: ARIDA 2: Rise of the Brave
1212030.description:
Face the challenges of the most arid regions of the 19th-century Brazilian backlands to complete a migratory journey filled with touching stories.

A single-player game that blends elements of adventure, exploration, and survival!

Gather resources, craft utensils, use tools, interact with other travelers, and experience the emotions of other residents of the Brazilian backlands in this historical, narrative-driven game!

Inspired by true events, ÁRIDA 2 introduces Cícera, a 13-year-old girl who sets off alone toward the historic town of Canudos!

FEATURES

Prepared for the night 🌜

Day and night in the backlands increase the need for provisions and defense. When the sunlight fades, new threats will emerge. And new guides too!

Accompanied on the journey 🐐

A solo journey deep into the backlands can be very dangerous. Who knows, you might find someone (or something) who will serve as your companion.

Equipped for adventure 🛠️

The challenges of the backlands require equipment. Use your machete and hoe for vital tasks like gathering water, food, and clearing paths.

Recipes to practice 🗒️

Living in the backlands requires its own science. The fauna and flora are unique, so be sure to learn the recipes available for crafting with typical items from the region.

Interact to survive 👥

Hunger and thirst can be quite cruel in times of drought. Interact with locals and travelers of the backlands to gain access to new stories and learning.

Explore to know 🗺️

Explore the most arid regions to learn more about the backlands and find the resources you need to stay afloat. A full inventory is always a good idea!

Stories to learn ✨

The backlands are a special place, with unique stories that only happen there. Venture out to find lost objects and stories from other travelers.

A game made with soul, care, and respect. ❤️🌵🎮

We create narrative games deeply inspired by Brazilian popular culture.

ÁRIDA 2 is part of a trilogy dedicated to the memory of the heroic town of Canudos. Our work celebrates all the anonymous figures who fight and have fought to build stories and legacies of resistance and solidarity in Brazil and around the world.

Long live Canudos!

英语*, 葡萄牙语 - 巴西*
*具有完全音频支持的语言
